No.

Fun game destroyed by the matchmaking system. You can NOT pit people learning a nuanced play style against Blue Lock wannabes.

Been stuck, at the lowest rank possible, playing with the same 20 toxic players who are all ALSO stuck because the ranked system is not performance based.

These are online issues with no way to salvage a solo play style in any way. Practice and prologue don't prepare you for the tackle spam of competitive play, or the toxic selfishness demonstrated frankly too often. 

If you buy this game, save yourself the trouble of doing any of the matchmaking nonsense, and just get a group of 10 to do customs.

Edit: The store and battlepass and currency system all work great though :) With most unlockables (even progression based) being locked behind an additional paywall. Happy fashion! (Sarcasm)

At first glance, Rematch looks like a blast—colorful, chaotic soccer with big energy and flashy moves. But the moment you pick up the controller, that excitement can wear off fast if you're not already a seasoned gamer.
There’s barely any guidance when you start. No proper tutorial, no warm-up area, just straight into the fire. And once you're in a match, it feels like everyone else already knows some secret dance you never learned. You miss passes, fumble shots, and get slammed with moves you didn’t even know existed.
The controls aren’t exactly intuitive either. They feel floaty at times, and the camera swings like it’s trying to film a music video. It's stylish, sure—but it often gets in the way of actually playing well.
Bottom line: Rematch has potential, but it’s not beginner-friendly. If you’re new, expect to struggle and maybe rage a bit. It might grow on you with time, but it doesn't make a great first impression

The game is not ready. It is a great concept and fun when the connection is good, but the amount of bugs and desync that currently persist in the game made me unable to enjoy it. When I'm getting constant no-regs, vibration confirmations combined with position advantage and still losing balls or priority to people 10 feet behind me, its just not fun to play. Again, great concept, and had A LOT of fun in the beta, but way too many desync issues, bugs, and exploits to find enjoyment over frustration. I look forward to this game in the future but right now it is not worth it. It is clunky and there are so many basic menu bugs it makes League's client seem fine. In comparison to Rocket League, it is like sand paper versus glass in terms of how smooth the game is. I'll gladly come back to this game in the future but not any time soon.

This really should still be in Early Access. Fun, but very flawed in its current state.

Inputs sometimes don't work at all, no-look passing will go anywhere but where you aim on keyboard, there are severe de-sync issues, and I would say there is a fair discrepancy between the good and poor players (I would know, I am part of the latter). I get it's Quick Match, but some balancing at all would be appreciated.

The controls tab within settings isn't even complete, and the prologue/training does the absolute bare minimum to prepare you for the rude awakening you will experience.

I'm unsure why the developer thought this was ready for 1.0, because it is not.

The game is very fun, but the servers are a crapshoot. in US East, which is the closest region to me, my ping is either an acceptable 40 or 100, with no discernible reason other than some of the servers they have are good and some are bad. I feel like the game also operates at a super low tick rate because it'll feel like my action connects (like a tackle) only for the ball to disappear back on to the foot of the person I tackled. The game also lacks content but the focus is multiplayer so I guess that's expected, but the price tag is high for what you get. Feels free to play despite being $40 CDN.

EDIT: Servers feel more stable but the animations are possibly even worse than they were before. I can't tell you how many times as keeper I've seen my character's hands reach for a ball only for them to not actually grab it at all.

Although Rematch has potential, the experience is ruined by significant technical problems. Matches are unstable due to persistent packet loss and lag, and there is a noticeable client-side desync, meaning that what you see isn't always what the server records. These problems result in unfair and annoying gameplay. It's difficult to suggest until the netcode is fixed and server stability is increased. 
Don't buy it now.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Como Beta Player, q vengo jugando desde el inicio de la beta opino que este juego la rompe. Si te gusta el fútbol pero estás podrido de los mismos juegos de siempre, Rematch es una locura. rápido, sin pausas, sin reglas molestas (chau offsides, faltas, laterales) y con una jugabilidad súper fluida. Controlás a un solo jugador, así que el trabajo en equipo es clave.

Tiene una onda tipo Rocket League con humanos y funciona increíble. Las mecánicas están re bien pensadas, el ritmo es intenso y las partidas son cortitas pero adictivas. Si lo jugás con amigos, te juro que te cagás de risa y se arma alto vicio.

✅ Lo mejor:
- Partidas rápidas, dinámicas y re entretenidas.
- Buena variedad de movimientos: pases, tiros, regates… si sabés moverte, podés hacer magia.
- Estilo visual futurista muy bien logrado.
- Los jugadores especiales como Ronaldinho están buenísimos, le dan un toque especial.
- Estaría buenísimo que metan a Messi o Maradona, sería un golazo y levantaría todavía más el hype.

❌ Lo malo (sobre todo si jugás solo):
- Siempre te toca algún boludito que quiere hacerse el gol él solo… no pasa una y encima son malísimos, te hacen perder partidos solos.
- No tiene chat dentro de la partida, ni para el equipo ni general, y eso se siente. Un mínimo chat o ping mejoraría la coordinación un montón.
- Estaría bueno que se pueda cambiar los controles libremente, sobre todo para los que queremos configurar los amagues o skills a gusto. No todos jugamos con lo que viene por defecto. 
- Todavía sin crossplay, aunque ya dijeron que lo van a poner.

Y sí, ya se nota que hay beta testers que la tienen re clara. Algunos te bailan y ni entendés qué pasó. Pero bueno, así se aprende también.

En resumen: Rematch es un juegazo con futuro, sobre todo si te gusta el fútbol arcade y lo jugás con amigos. Tiene todo para seguir creciendo. Solo falta que la comunidad aprenda a jugar en equipo… y que los devs se tiren la magia de meter a Messi o el Diego y ya está, se consagra el juego y los creadores.

Firma: El Michee

[h1] Análise [/h1]
 
É um jogo que considero que vai ficar muito bom um dia, mas não que atualmente eu ache isso. Joguei os Betas e os problemas que vi não foram resolvidas no jogo final.

É bem divertido, focado em um promissor cenário de eSports, tem semelhanças com o famoso Rocket League, e possui poucos bugs no sentido do jogo (Unreal Engine no entanto nos agracia com crashes aleatórios, ainda mais se você tiver um PC com processadores mais novos, mas não é algo particular desse jogo e sim dessa Engine porca).

O ponto principal é sobre a jogabilidade. Ela é fluída, poucos problemas das partidas (pelo menos comigo), e você como jogador ou goleiro possui um arsenal de skills muito úteis para várias situações. 

Porém, as opções de controle é o calcanhar de Aquiles desse jogo. Não gostei da jogabilidade pelo teclado e mouse e as predefinições para joystick são horríveis, e pra piorar você não pode mudar-lás. É até um tanto estranho um jogo de futebol não ter como customizar o layout dos botões. Isso deixa a curva de aprendizagem um pouco mais difícil, e eu pelo menos não consegui ter paciência para me acostumar.
 
[h1] NOTA: D [/h1]

First of all, the game is fun and has a potential to be developed. The parts I don't like about the game are unfortunately more than the parts I like. Especially spamming some keys is quite simple and can reduce the other person's enjoyment of the game. Ping problems still continue, at some points the ball can be teleported to the opponent's feet while it is at your feet. The thing that bothers me the most in the game is that the goal I score or the shot I save looks different on my and my opponent's screens. This problem has been going on since the tests and it hasn't been completely prevented. The point I like is that the game can really be improved a lot. It is fun to play and I believe that it will be a really great game when a few different contents are added. The biggest disadvantage of the game is its price.

Update: After several months this game feels its dead. There are no impact updates other than cosmetics. Lots of cheaters, server issues, bugs and matchmaking is still not fair etc. Waste of potential...

STRIKING MY ORIGINAL POSITIVE REVIEW. This game's voice chat in its current state is completely and utterly broken. First of all, it's the type of game that immediately puts you on open mic when you start the game without telling you. You have to either be told by a friend or check your settings. The only other option besides open mic is "muted", where you have to pause your game and hit a key to mute/unmute yourself. I HAVE MY VOICE CHAT SET TO DISABLED. But does this disable voice chat? No. No it does not. In fact, having voice chat set to disabled made my game put me on OPEN MIC DESPITE IT SHOWING THE ICON THAT SAYS I AM MUTED. Before I knew that I was on open mic, I still heard my teammates despite it being "disabled". Changing the voice chat volume in the settings did nothing. During all this, I was literally broadcasting myself talking to people in a discord call to my whole team for god knows how many games before one of my teammates responded to something I said in the call. This pissed me off to no end. The voice chat modes are poorly designed and clearly unfinished. I understand that this is likely a freak bug and it will be patched, but it frankly is deeply DEEPLY upsetting and unacceptable that disabling voice chat outright did the complete opposite and put me on open mic while STILL showing that I was muted.

This is a very very serious issue and could lead to some severe problems if someone is talking about private information while this bug is not patched. 

The game is fun. I originally recommended this game, and I would like to recommend it again in the future. But as of writing this, just beware of serious bugs like this.

Not really a product at this stage, more of a demo, but somehow there is a battle pass (which in no way guarantees long term support). Still, the act of kicking a ball is probably as close as it's gonna get to the real thing emotionally and the game is fairly unique. Not worth full price, but good in GamePass and worthy of a wishlist. 

If there is a takeaway it's that Sloclap still have an opportunity to tap into story focused sports sims (that has been untapped since Supergiant's Pyre), but Rematch will probably choke on it's own ambitions as another live service.

Normalde üzerinde hiç deneyim sahibi olmadığım ürünlere gelir geçer (her ne kadar olumlu ya da olumsuz vermek arasında bırakılsam da) bir şeyler karalayıp bunu da bir karara bağlamayı sevmem. Ancak burada yaşadığım problemler de bir noktada deneyimin kendisi oluyor.

Ben daha hiç görmedim ki bir oyunu bootlamaya çalışırken bsod alayım [bir şeyler destabilize oluyor ve windows'un kendi çekirdek bileşeni -- ntoskrnl.exe çöküyor] ve sistem komple reboota girsin. Bu sorun REMATCH'e özgü bir de. Hiçbir şekilde sorunu izole edemediğim gibi bunun için uğraşmak da istemiyorum yahu. Niye 2025'de sikik bir oyun için kafa patlatıyorum ben? Normalde bunu çok problem etmektense sorunun kaynağına inmeye çalışıp çözüm odaklı bakmayı da isterim ancak bir oyunu aldığın gibi çalıştıramamak abes bir şey. Burada belki benim konfigürasyonda bir sıkıntı var, olabilir, ancak yüzlerce oyunu açan bir sistemde bir oyuna takılmak doğal bir sonuç olarak o oyunu suçlamama yol açıyor. Bunu demekle beraber hem kernel düzeyinde çalışan diğer anticheatler hem de EAC kullanan diğer oyunlar (en basitinden yakın zamanda Fall Guys oynadığım görülebilir) hiçbir sıkıntı yaşatmıyor. Dump dosyalarını tarattım ve çatışan potansiyel appleri bir bir öldürdüm. EAC'yi baştan yükledim. Driverları güncelledim/roll back attım, farklı configlerde bootlamaya çalıştım, lokal dosyaları modifiye etmeye çalıştım. Olmayınca da olmuyor. Başka insanların da bu problemi yaşadığını biliyorum ama Steam forumlarında Technopat Sosyal gibi takılmak istemiyorum. Velhasılkelam sokim böyle işe. 

Her neyse uzun lafın kısası olması gereken oldu. Hiçbir arkadaşım benle bu oyunu oynamak istemedi (sayıları da çok değil zaten). Ben de oyuna giremedim ve şimdi iade talebimi iletiyorum. Oyunda da pas vermiyorlarmış zaten. Tam bir lavuk oyunu!

The game has real potential and the devs seem active with updates but in its current state it’s just not worth the full price I’d honestly wait for a big patch or grab it on sale because right now it feels more frustrating than fun

I’m honestly pretty disappointed with the overall state of the game. It’s got potential, no doubt, but it feels like too much is missing for a game that costs €25 upfront.

There’s no proper team creation, only one single 5v5 ranked mode, no rematch button (which is especially weird given the name), and no report function. That last one really stings, because I’m almost certain i already ran into a cheater using some kind of speedhack and there was literally nothing I could do about it.

On top of all that, there’s no story or singleplayer content of any kind. I get that the focus is on PvP, but for the price, it wouldn’t hurt to have something more than just the one ranked queue.

And yet, despite all this missing core functionality, there’s already a Battle Pass in place. That just feels wrong. Like the priority was monetization over building a complete game.

I don’t think REMATCH is hopeless. But in its current state, it's not really worth it.

I will say the good thing is the game looks great. It is fun to look at. It can be fun when you don't have to succumb to awful players online. However, the controls are bad --the shooting doesn't gravitate to the goal like every other football game and instead goes in the direction of the camera leaving you to use the pass button to make shots for crosses out of your characters peripheral. Often times the player will lose control of the ball for no reason. Slide tackle and normal tackle are the same button so you have to let go of run and maybe lose momentum to get a normal tackle. There's no offsides and since players don't know how to play football and keep defenders back, there is a lot of cherrypicking. Scummy players aren't forced to clear the box to allow for goalie to get rid of the ball -- why even have the box lines drawn on the field. It feels like the developers didn't use a test team / play their own game before releasing. The game looked to be a mix of Rocket League and Fifa when I initially saw it but it fails to be either in terms of the creativity and explosiveness that Rocket League has and the movement and controls that Fifa has.  Also there just isn't a lot here to justify the price point and they included battlepass nonsense. I wouldn't recommend you pay for it especially when Rocket League is free.

EDIT: I start off as goalie EVERY MATCH. I'm stuck watching players not pass as I sit in the goalie box. Why? What were they doing when they made this?

EDIT2: After the update the games performance is worse with the players often losing the ball still. After so much time playing, other issues  in the mechanics became more easily identifiable. The slide tackle is ridiculously long, about 4-5 lengths of the players height. Both tackles have pretty quick recovery, if an opponent is juked after missing a tackle they have ample time to recover and spam tackle again where as other games, you're rewarded better for shaking an opponent and another player has to pick up the slack. Tackles go back to the opponent often -- there needs to be an option to give a tackle directional input to choose where the ball goes when tackling.

--Season 3, they didn't fix ANY of the problems. This would explain why the game is already dead. Will definitely be skeptical when seeing another title from Sloclap.

NÃO TEM CROSSPLAY — A maior reclamação
(embora seja a prioridade deles, até o momento sem crossplay.)

Vamos começar pelo básico que ninguém engole: não tem crossplay. Você compra no Steam, seu parceiro joga no Gamepass? Esquece. Cada um no seu canto. Então pensa bem a plataforma que você quer jogar.

Bugs e crashs — o terror das ranqueadas

Imagina a cena: você na final da ranqueada, fazendo aquele gol épico ou uma assistência Absolute Cinema, e o jogo simplesmente trava ou crasha e você perde seus pontos. Você repensa suas escolhas de vida inteira, né? Ainda tem aquelas travadas do nada, o áudio que muda de idioma sozinho, a bola atravessando goleiro… Se eu for listar tudo, essa análise vira um livro.

Ranqueada desbalanceada — emoção ou estresse?

Quer emoção? Vai pra ranqueada. Quer estresse? Também. O matchmaking parece sorteio de dados: diamante jogando com elite, mestre com platina, uma bagunça só. Dá pra subir? Dá. eu peguei ELITE jogando com aleatórios. Mas possivelmente você perderá uns fios de cabelo no processo, sem dúvida. Principalmente se você for CLT e quiser jogar pra desestressar.

Aleatórios corrompidos pelo mal (e protagonistas de BlueLock)

Jogar solo no Rematch é praticamente uma roleta russa emocional. Sempre aparece aquele que se acha o protagonista de BlueLock — (Eu sou fã de BlueLock e digo com propriedade que se você não PASSA A BOLA, você não é um EGOÍSTA FUNCIONAL no jogo, você é um cone, um obstáculo, um inútil.) Com todo respeito. 

Você vai cair com Aleatórios corrompidos assim: 
KRISTIANO RONALD: “Se acha o artilheiro, mas vive na banheira esperando passe que nunca chega.”
LIONAL MEÇI: “Todo drible dele mata… mata o time, mata as jogadas, mata a paciência.”
ZAGUEIRO CANHÃO:"Só bicuda, sem direção, de vez em quando vai no gol... aliado."
MANUEL NOIAR: "Goleiro com reflexos absurdos, nunca vi esquivar da bola com tanta maestria."


Mecânicas — por que a gente ainda ama esse jogo

Nem tudo é caos: o jogo tem mecânicas bem legais. A física da bola é simples e eficiente, o que deixa tudo mais dinâmico e gostoso de jogar. No fundo, o Rematch é divertido pra caramba, só falta aquela polidinha básica pra ficar redondo.

Amigos — o segredo para aproveitar de verdade

O truque é simples: chame os amigos. Jogar Rematch com uma galera entrosada, ou pelo menos engraçada, vale cada segundo.

Resumo final

Rematch é um jogo incrível, mas tem muita coisa pra melhorar ainda. Enquanto isso, junta os amigos, segura a raiva e boa sorte na busca pelo Elite. Ah, e lembra: não tem crossplay!

Let’s get straight to the point:
– They seriously need to add body physics during contact. My player just glitches out like crazy whenever blocked by a defender.
– Recent match history and replays should be added ASAP.
– Role-based matchmaking would be a solid improvement too.
– The game’s still new and has a decent player base, but sometimes the matchmaking takes way too long (approx 5-10 minutes).

That being said, after 10 hours of gameplay, I gotta admit—it’s fun, fresh, and exciting. Not easy to learn, and definitely hard to master. The dribbling can feel clunky at times, but honestly, that’s part of what makes the game feel unique than other football games. It forces you to learn proper positioning, not just spam dribble moves to get past defenders.

Игра исключительно для игры с друзьями как в ранкеде как в анранкеде. Абсолютно неиграбельна для соло игры. Не весело и по ранкеду не продвинешься. Золотой дивизион - это максимум, что можно достичь в соло игре. Дальше: против тебя будут играть челы в пати со своими войсами и тактиками, за тебя же будут афкшеры и руинеры или игроки которые играют как бронза, но почему то с тобой в пати в золотом дивизионе. Невозможно играть в соло. Максимально не рекомендую эту игру для тех, кто собирается играть в соло.

UPD. После +150 часов игры кое-как дополз до лиги Мастер, хотя уже 273 уровень. Все эти 150 часов я провел на голкипере. И вот что я вам скажу: голкипер здесь невероятно слабый. У нападающего масса инструментов забить ворота в то время как у голкипера прыжок на пробел невероятно медленный, самая бесполезная функция скольжения по земле (до сих пор не увидел, не нашел ситуации где можно применить эту бесполезную функцию). Я бы хотел получить баф на голкипера: ускорить анимацию прыжка или же увеличить хит-бокс ловли мячей в оборонительной стойке. 

Вердикт: игра дерьма, все-также не рекомендую.

Ancien joueur de PES, FIFA et Rocket League, j'avais été agréablement surpris par les premières heures de jeu : gameplay fun, sensation agréable manette en main, animations sympas... Bref, le potentiel était là.

Malheureusement, après plus de 26 heures passées dessus, mon ressenti a radicalement changé.

Points négatifs (et ils sont nombreux) :

Aucune nouveauté en termes de contenu ou de gameplay. Très vite, tout devient redondant : les mêmes animations, les mêmes metas, les mêmes situations de jeu encore et encore.

La communauté est toxique, en particulier dans les modes classés : AFK, joueurs qui trollent, refusent de défendre ou de jouer sérieusement… C’est un fléau permanent.

Impossible de filtrer ou signaler les comportements nuisibles, ce qui détruit littéralement l’expérience, surtout en solo ou en duo.

Jouer en équipe complète ? Bonne chance pour trouver quatre personnes motivées et coordonnées pour un jeu qui devient vide au bout de quelques heures.

Aucune logique de jeu incitative, notamment en défense : un simple timer sur la possession (comme au basket) forcerait les équipes à attaquer au lieu de temporiser bêtement dans leur camp.

Et oui, il faut le dire : les comportements abusifs sont souvent concentrés dans certaines régions, ce qui n’aide pas à rendre l’expérience plus agréable.

Conclusion :
Le fun des débuts s’évapore très vite. Le jeu manque cruellement de profondeur, de diversité, de mise à jour, et surtout d’outils communautaires pour filtrer les nuisibles.
À part si vous avez déjà un groupe de potes motivés pour y jouer (et encore, ça s’essouffle vite), je ne peux que vous déconseiller l’achat de ce jeu. Il donne envie au début, mais on se rend rapidement compte qu’il est vide.

Dommage, vraiment.

Еще с самого детства думал о том как бы поиграть в фифу от первого лица и вот спустя 14 лет это мысли люди создали такую игру.
А теперь конструктивно разбираю что меня зацепило , а что не понравилось.
Затея игры - очень интересно. 
Графическая часть - выглядит очень похоже на Rocket League задними фонами , вообщем нормас . 
Система подбора игроков - доработать в плане уравновешивания (но возможно из за того что людей еще мало с этим проблемы и возникают) 
Сервера - нужно явно решать эту проблему , т.к часто попадается сервера где люди прям на глазах тпхаются и мяч просто невозможно выбить или поймать на воротах. 
Детализация персонажей - оч классно сделали что можно настроить полностью персонажа .
Также я бы улучшил систему меток или добавил бы чат.
В игре можно добавить что-то типо кланов чтобы была общая форма у команды и добавить логотипы команд. 
Ввести ежемесячный турнир с начала можно даже с минимальными выигрышами.
Добавить уникальные вещи в системе Дропсов в коллаборацией с твичом , чтобы стримеры делали популярнее игру и приводили новых игроков. 
По-моему личному мнению я хочу чтобы игра жила и имела онлайн.
В первый же день залпанул 8 часов и игра очень затянула. 
------------------------------------------------------------------
Не хватает соревновательного режима 3x3 - добавили
------------------------------------------------------------------
Появились читеры , которые бегают с мячом с скоростью света - исправили
------------------------------------------------------------------

Моя оценка 9/10 - как и обещал оценка повысилась , потому что добавили и сделали все что требовалось.

Rematch c’est vraiment fun à jouer, surtout entre potes. Le gameplay est bien pensé, c’est nerveux, les mouvements sont cools, et t’as envie de t’améliorer.

Par contre, y’a plusieurs trucs qui mériteraient d’être revus. L’interface est pas super claire, ça manque de lisibilité parfois. Et la hitbox, surtout sur certains moves ou contacts, elle donne des trucs bizarres.

Le plus gros souci selon moi, c’est qu’il n’y a pas encore de crossplay. Si t’es pas sur le Discord de la commu FR, tu croises quasi jamais de Français en jeu. C’est dommage, parce qu’un bon match avec de la comm’ ça change tout. Avec le crossplay, on tomberait sûrement plus souvent sur des joueurs FR, et ça rendrait l’expérience bien meilleure.

Bref, gros potentiel, c’est fun et addictif, mais j’espère vraiment qu’ils vont continuer à corriger et améliorer tout ça.

On paper, the manual mechanics—aiming your shots, stamina management, switching roles dynamically—should make for thrilling and rewarding football. In reality, they often feel clunky, inconsistent, and unbalanced. The game wants to emphasize skill, but its core systems aren’t polished enough to make that enjoyable. Passing feels floaty, dribbling is unresponsive, and hit detection with the ball can sometimes feel outright broken.

Ranked Matchmaking: The Real Dealbreaker

The ranked system is, frankly, a mess. You’re constantly thrown into uneven matches, often with teammates who don’t understand basic positioning—or worse, refuse to play defense altogether. Solo players are punished the most, forced to endure one-sided blowouts against stacked squads with coordinated communication.

On top of that, lag and server issues compound the frustration. Delayed inputs, teleporting players, and desynced ball physics are far too common, making ranked matches feel like a coin flip rather than a test of skill. Instead of being the game’s competitive backbone, ranked matchmaking is its biggest weakness.

Content & Features: Barebones at Best

Beyond the matchmaking woes, Rematch also launched with very little to do:

No crossplay at launch, splitting the player base.

It feels like the developers rushed to monetize cosmetics and passes before addressing the game’s broken core, leaving competitive players with little incentive to keep grinding.

Verdict: Don’t Waste Your Time (Yet)

Rematch could one day evolve into a great arcade sports title. The potential is there: the visuals are striking, and the idea of a skill-driven five-a-side football game is exciting. But right now, it’s buried under unpolished mechanics, terrible ranked matchmaking, and an overall lack of content.

Unless Sloclap commits to fixing its core systems and completely overhauls ranked play, this game isn’t worth your time—or your frustration.

I want to like it but the physics are so unrefined and unpredictable that it's just frustrating to play if you're actually trying to play it like a soccer game. 

The blue circle on the ball is inconsistent with locking when defending passes, trying to receive a pass, or continuing a fast dribble. 

It's ridiculous you can tackle a defender and create a break-away past the backline, but the defender is capable of insta-sprinting back and recovering in 1.5 seconds with a magnetic foot tackle from 2 yards behind you. Lots of just mind-numbing gameplay with players just standing-tackling the ball back and forth for 10 seconds, with no clear expectation of where the ball will bounce judging from where each player is. Seems the nature of having more cartoony player models makes the deflections and tackles really unpredictable when players are fighting for ball control.

I'm probably going to keep playing as I think the devs are working to make things better, but $30 for this was kinda a rip-off as it feels unfinished. Lots of good ideas being tried here for a soccer game, of course, but overall it's just feels messy, unpredictable, and unrewarding. I mean honestly, you're seldom scoring a goal like a normal soccer match - you basically have to resort to some bank-shot triple header tap-in combo if you want consistent scoring.

Like I said, I'm hopeful that the feel of the game will improve through updates, but as of now I just feel disappointed whenever I give this game another try.

I personally didn't experience crash, little freezes at worst. There is definitly a tone of desync in almost every match. But yeah the controls and the ball handling in this game dont feel good mostly because desync i think. Sometime you tacle like 30 cm next to the ball it doesn't stick with it, and sometimes you see someone sticking the ball to his feets while the pass came 1 meter away from him. This is not pleasant to experience at all. In all PvP games, netcode, servers, performances, need to be perfect or it just suck for most of people and it creates a more frustrating experience. Also controllers just suck at this game, if everyone played with controller we would not see it but when you play vs keyboard, they just manage the camera and aim MUCH better than controllers. Even with the sensitivity at max everywhere it sucks on controller, mostly in moments you have to watch the ball coming at you from behind and at the same time turn the camera to the front and at the same time aim at the goal. It makes the task MUCH harder on controller compare to keyboard. It's not like in FPS where they give some aim assist because controllers are really known to be bad against mouse and keyboard. Here there is nothing to help controllers. I saw many people stuggling with controllers, you see in matches when they are on controllers, sometime i have seen 5 people in a 5m radius fighting for the ball for like 5 sec with no one able to touch the ball in the middle. 5 sec is long, it was funny to watch for sure. Sometime the ball stick and sometimes it doesn't, add to this collision jank and desync and you have a great melting pot for a pretty frustrating experience. Many people are also enjoying the game and don't mind the issues to the point of leaving the game, to me it's plenty. If they fix all this there is maybe a future for this game, for the moment, i prefer to stop and get a refund. And it has already been said, but obviously charging 25€ on standard and having a free to play economy in is always a bad sign on the mindset of a studio. Real brand in the game, famous people like kanye west, wait to see unicorns, nicki minaj come to the game, there are definitly showing they have made this game to MAKE MONEY and that's it, this is the MAIN focus compare to their previous titles. Do i have to remind they have made Absolver before ? Full PvP game with a great complexity and a hard skill learning curve. And you know what, you paid for the game and you didn't had to pay for anything after, there was only 1 DLC at 2.99€. They have changed and i think their mindset now is just f this, lets make a game to become billionaires, f the fair economy for players.

The kind of game I wish I had a middle option for, not good and not bad, but needs a LOT of work in it's systems and the input lag + bugs are really annoying. I also see that it has exactly the same problem as Rocket League had with the community being beyond toxic and with the lowest IQ average I've seen amongst online multiplayer games.
Not comforted by the fact that this already has passes and paid stuff for content, where you can't even rebind your keys yet. Oh yeah, about that, the game is "over-complicating" itself with the current binds and camera options, when so much could be done to allow people to more easily get into it.

Add more defensive options, seems like attackers have a huge toolkit where people defending can't do much but hope the ball doesn't clip through you. Oh and those stupid flicks seriously need to have a cooldown/nerfed, currently it's so easy to just spam flicks across the map when 80% of the times people can't counter that because of lag/bad hitboxes.

Most importantly tho... At it's core, when things click and stars align, it's VERY fun to play. There is potential for a great game here so overall giving it a positive because I love football and want to see the game thrive, but it needs a lot of work and more added content.

Gra naprawdę ma potencjał, osobiście od zawsze czekałem ( jako fan piłki nożnej) na tego typu gierkę. Ale na ten moment nie mogę zbytnio polecić. Ale może i zacznę od plusów :
- na pewno szata graficzna ( jest przyjemna dla oka),
 - sam zamysł na rozgrywkę, granie w to ze znajomymi daję dużo funu.
Właśnie ze znajomymi.... teraz jest dobry pomysł na przedstawienie według mojej oceny negatywów: 
- granie z randomami to jest czysta ruletka ( możesz trafić naprawdę na ogarniętych ludzi którzy próbują grać jako team albo na gości którzy ciągle się kiwają i drużyna traci przez to bramki.... Naprawdę potrafi to doprowadzać do zniechęcenia do dalszej gry. Więc czysto teoretycznie tryb rankingowy jest tu według mnie bez sensowny i nie jest adekwatny do faktycznych umiejętności),
- masa bugów ( takie jakie natknąłem podczas swojego grania): raz zdarzyło mi się na trafić lewitującą postać w powietrzu, również raz zdarzyło mi się, że przez cały mecz nie widziałem żadnej postaci. Odnośnie bramkarzy, zdarza się że wpadają oni normalnie z piłką do bramki a gol nie zostaje zaliczony...
- bramkarz jest trochę zbyt OP według mnie, piłka czasami leci w światło bramki i wydaję się, że będzie gol, a on potrafi magicznie po wyskoku lekko teleportować się do piłki, łapiąc ją. ( mi się wydaję, że to bug ale może się mylę, jeśli tak to zdecydowanie jest to na minus)
- powinno wprowadzić się większe kary dla osób wychodzących z gry ( jest to bardzo nagminne) oraz dla osób które psują grę innym graczom ( typu strzelanie do własnej bramki etc.)
Więc jak wspomniałem, gra naprawdę ma potencjał ale to już zależy od twórców co z tym zrobią. W obecnym stanie technicznym polecam kupić na jakiejś promocji. Gra wyszła w pełnej wersji, a czuję się jakbym grał w jakieś Early Access.
 Jeśli jesteś solo graczem, to już zależy od Ciebie czy chcesz w to zagrać modląc się o ogarniętych ludzi za każdym razem...  Natomiast jeśli masz swoich znajomych do pogrania, to wtedy wydaję się to najbardziej sensownym zakupem!

Gra na samym początku spoko ale im dalej w las jest kilka minusów o których można trochę pogadać...
wiec może zacznę od negatywów w tej grze... 

[b]-Voicechat bez funkcji Push-to-talk[/b]
Może kogoś zaskoczyć ale posiadanie w grze [b]VC[/b] i nie dodania nastawialnego przycisku do mówienia czasami powoduje doznania rodem z albo słucham jak koleś robi nie przyjemne dźwięki albo słyszę u kolesia całą jego rodzinę co powoduje u mnie w dużej mierze wyciszenie systemu gdyż to jest bardzo wkurzające.

[b]-Toksyczne jednostki (głównie od tych Ruskojezycznych)[/b]
jak na kilka gier w przeciągu tych dwóch dni natrafiłem na bardzo mile rzucającymi tekstami istoty które sądzą chyba że w grze jest proxy-voice-chat tym czasem rzucają ładne wiązanki a czasami gdy gra nie idzie po ich myśli są w stanie sabotować drużynę specjalnie griffując grę podając piłki do przeciwnika albo próbując sami wrzucić piłkę do swojej brami...

[b]-Postać gracza czasami porusza się jak czołg[/b]
I to w tym negatywnym świetle słowa [b]czołg[/b] Czasami postać zachowuje się strasznie ociężale nie które wykonywane manewry są mało responsywne czy to jak stara się je wykonać na klawiaturze czy na padzie. Momentami gra dawała mi odczucie że moja postać to taka upośledzony samochód z rocket league'a z wiecznie odwracającymi się sterowaniem.

[b]-Battlepass i Itemshop za realną forsę[/b]
Jak to każda gra usługa ta gra musi mieć powód aby cie przywiązać do krzesła i marnować ci życie wiec i w tej grze jest opcjonalny Battlepass dla skinów i tak dalej... za który dev'owie chcą abyś płacił... no i jest item shop z [b]walutą premium[/b]
Ja wiem że normalizowanie gier płatnych stało się tak mocne że gry przypominają w 80% typowe MMO przeszyte Mikrotranzakcjami ale cholera gra kosztuje [b] aż 90 zł[/b] i ma jeszcze dodatkowy kontent za który możesz wywalić kolejne Pięciokrotność tyle co cena gry!

Ale dobra nie można puścić grę tylko w złym świetle wiec czas teraz na bardziej pozytywne elementy gry
[b]+Gry są szybkie i przyjemne[/b]
Ignorując fakt wcześniej wspomnianej toksyczności gry są w miarę szybkie od dzięki zasadzie przewagi czterych punktów lub faktu że jedna gra nie trwa dłużej niż 15 minut. Sama rozgrywka gdy też się w nią wczuć daje trochę ekscytacji jak typowa gra w przysłowiową gałę.

[b]+Creator postaci[/b]
Jedną z fajnych aspektów gry jest Creator postaci w grze dostaje się walutę którą można przeznaczyć na kosmetykę w tym aspekcie jest też wcześniej poruszony Battlepass oraz Itemshop że w sumie ciężko uznać to za plus czy minus ale na boisku możesz być jednak całkiem wyróżniającą się postacią czy to jakiś Drip człek albo abominacja laboratoryjna.

[b]+Aż tak długo nie czeka się na grę (a na pewno na razie)[/b]
Jak na razie na grę rzuciło się sporo graczy w największym peaku gry było nawet 91,000+ graczy a w aktualnym okresie mamy 20,000+ graczy grających w ten tytuł że znalezienie gry nie jest aż tak ciężkie.
[i]Oczywiście to może z czasem się zmienić że tutaj warto podejść z przymrożeniem oka.[/i]

[b]+Mała pojemność miejsca[/b]
Ta gra dopiero wyszła i na chwilę obecną nie waży więcej niż 10gb (w sumie nawet mniej)
co w aktualnych czasach robi furore licząc że wiele gier AA czy AAA potrafią ważyć po nawet 80+gb

[b]+Gra działa na steamdecku[/b]
Postawowe zaskoczenie dla mnie było że gra odpala się i działa na spokojnie na Steam Decku oczywiście ma to trochę problemów takich jak czytelność na tym urządzeniu ale jednak działa i pozwala zagrać w grę w trybie multiplayer mimo faktu że używa EasyAntyCheat.

Après 2 heures de jeu voici mon rapide résumé sur Rematch :
Les points positifs :
- Un jeu cool à jouer si on aime pas trop un autre jeu et ses voitures qui volent plus qu'elles ne roulent.
- La DA est sympa.

Voilà maintenant, les points négatifs :
- Un Desync trop présent, certains ballons atterrissaient dans mes mains/pieds alors que je ne suis pas dessus et inversement.
- Beaucoup trop de joueurs qui gardent le ballon et joue tout seul sans faire de passes pour satisfaire leur ego. En 2 heures de jeu dans 50% de mes parties j'ai eu des teammates qui spammaient le bouton pour demander une passe, et une fois à la balle en main ils ne la lâchaient plus jusqu'à se prendre un tacle ou tirer avec.
- Ces même joueurs sont ceux sont toxiques en vocal et hurlent dans leurs micro pour demander la balle.
- Et enfin, 25€ pour un jeu qui n'est pas cross-plateform en 2025 à la sortie, c'est vraiment nulle.

Au final, j'ai quand même passé un moment fun, le jeu a des vibes de Galactic Football pour ceux qui ont la ref, mais si vous voulez jouer au jeu avec des potes, attendez le cross-plateform (s'il y en aura un), et attendez qu'il soit moins cher. Je me répète mais pour ce que le jeu propose tout de suite 25€ ça reste assez cher.

Updated Review: Still broken servers, meta is still to abuse the poorly implemented game mechanics, there have been 5 other brand collabs since I originally wrote the initial review lmfao. This company is pure greed, every thing I claimed came to fruition. Games very fun when its not aggravating as hell. Don't recommend currently as charging 30 bucks to play and then the only thing your xp counts towards is locked behind a $10 paywall is beyond greedy (Not even a "Thanks for your early support of our brand new unproven game here's a free small BP because you're such a good pay pig" worse than a bar with a cover charge and $12 drinks) Also Ronaldinho & puma collab day one? okay how much did y'all pay for that? Most players I see are Neapolitan ice cream men with no shoes bruh no one cares about wearing Puma in this game, this isn't FIFA (That's a VERY good thing, keep it that way). I'd recommend focusing on cool cosmetics that stick out, a new pattern of lines on the same skin tight dry-fit with wrinkles around the arms rather than the waist is beyond sad considering how stylized the game is. The zipper jacket thing in Qualifiers BP should be the bare minimum that is the only thing so far that actually looks unique and makes me want to grind for. Speaking of grind, maybe some one can point it out to me but I can never see when I gain BP xp? I just randomly have another token every 10 games it feels like. I see my character lvl go up but I never see when I unlock a BP token, that would be nice seeing as I paid $40 bucks to be working thru that BP. 

Moving away from the greed rant. Game is very fun when the servers don't die because 3 players ran up on the ball. Some other small things, make more training packs, add endless training packs, and make them restart-able immediately. I want to warm up as goalkeeper, sweeper, striker until my friends get on and every couple of shots I have to sit thru 3 loading screens just to get back to the practice pack. Maybe down the line add player made training packs, just steal from Rocket League basically. 
Free play is great for warming up offense but there's no defensive warm up to speak of. 
Ball-cam. needs work. I'd recommend turning that on ASAP tho cuz once your brain locks in Y-Triangle for the jump it takes a sec to unlearn. Again just steal from RL lol I get that aiming is tied to where your cursor is so you can't have a hard lock but give us camera settings to change how strict or loose the cam is. Currently it just kinda centers your screen where the ball was but doesn't do much past that. 
Let me rebind keys and controller layout, not just 3 presets. 
Add cross-play. 
Fix those small things, get the servers away from RNGing dribble clashes, and trust that the players will come and you don't need to nickel and dime the first ones that show up. Once they change all that I might recommend. It feels like the game was planned to be F2P, genuinely. Without the BP there's next to nothing in the game, some basic cosmetics are it. I think they threw a $30 price tag on it a couple days before it shipped just to see if they could, the game was clearly made as a F2P lmao.

Edit after playing for another 20 hrs. The servers are getting worse lmfao, I have a consistent 20 or lower ping and still have the ball phase through me totally randomly. Geting even more annoying than it already was lol

Rematch não se assemelha a uma partida de futebol tradicional. Deixe de lado faltas, escanteios e laterais; aqui, a prioridade é permitir que o jogo flua de maneira contínua. Com formatos dinâmicos de 3x3, 4x4 ou 5x5, Rematch transforma o futebol em um espetáculo que valoriza resistência, improvisação e, em muitos casos, um certo egoísmo. A ausência de interrupções típicas, como faltas e laterais, resulta em uma dinâmica de jogo extremamente rápida. A bola está sempre em movimento, o que exige dos jogadores um elevado nível de concentração, condicionamento físico e, acima de tudo, uma leitura de jogo ágil. Contudo, essa liberdade que intensifica a adrenalina também tem suas desvantagens. Muitos jogadores acabam se tornando "fominhas", priorizando o gol individual a qualquer custo, o que pode desagradar aqueles que têm um espírito mais colaborativo. Além disso, o jogo é bastante exigente. Quem imagina que será apenas uma "peladinha" descontraída se engana: Rematch demanda intensidade constante. Sem pausas, o ritmo é acelerado e a recuperação entre as jogadas é quase inexistente. Apesar dos desafios, como o individualismo excessivo e o desgaste físico, Rematch proporciona uma experiência emocionante e fora do comum. É um jogo que não apenas testa as habilidades técnicas, mas também a resistência psicológica e a inteligência tática dos jogadores. Para aqueles que buscam uma alternativa ao futebol convencional, onde a improvisação prevalece sobre o apito do árbitro, Rematch é uma escolha excelente. É desafiador, sem dúvida. É caótico, também. Mas é exatamente esse caos controlado que torna o jogo tão cativante.

REMATCH is fundamentally broken. Instead of a proper physics system that something like Rocket League has, REMATCH has a priority system that is incredibly flimsy and makes precise plays incredibly frustrating. The fact that bicycle kicks and mid-air volleys are 90% of the goals in this game is really telling. Defending is damn near impossible with attackers exploiting a blatantly broken mechanics and glitches. Goalkeeping is inconsistent and frustrating, as dives act strangely depending on with direction you're facing, and attackers have an extreme advantage in the air. The ball phases through bodies, netcode is atrocious, servers are laggy, exploits and glitches run the meta, and REMATCH's community is toxic. There's also just many crucial features missing from REMATCH. There's no report system, no crossplay, and no proper rank based match-making, not to mention the broken state of the core mechanics.

It's been months now, and despite promises for fixes to exploits, the game has gotten WORSE with recent patches. MORE exploits and glitches run the meta and playing this game is just completely unfair as a defender or goalie right now. I simply cannot recommend this game in its current state.

I cannot recommend this game anymore. 6 months post release and it is still a buggy mess. I mean there is a bug that when easily executed makes the match unplayable! That's insane! Just score a goal to go ahead and then get ball and just exit match. Wait till it's almost over and just rejoin and that's the win! So many glitches it's in excusable!  "Prio" is still stupidly broken, dribble moves also broken, and servers suck. Ball appears to curve around after being tackled and still end up under the player's foot due to exploiting the defensive stance button. Game had so much potential but Sloclap has definitely dropped the ball on this one. Maybe in a year or two (if the player base still exists) this game may be playable and enjoyable. 

Just think this game at launch was hitting 92K players for the first bit, then the numbers dipped hard core; went from 92K at peak to a measly 4.8K at peak! I mean wow, what a fall off!!! Oh well, I'm sure something better will come out and takes it's place at some point, hopefully something polished and ready to play that isn't broken and plays like an actual football game. RIP.

Game is extremely fun with others. If you have multiple friends, or even one, to play with the game is a blast.

However, there are plenty of bugs and problems with both the game play and achievement synchronization. Game doesn't register your wins for the "3 wins in a row" achievement, "Post to Post" where you need to get an assist as goalie doesn't work, and the synchronization between levels, goals, assists, and distance run are all messed up. For the bugs in the game sometimes the ball can get stuck on the ground not allowing you to grab it, there is de-sync between teams (and even teammates), the ball seems to go straight throw the goalie resulting in goals (might be a de-sync problem), and the controls sometimes don't work (slide tackling when not sprinting and such).

I hope that this game gets its updates and these are all fixed because I genuinely enjoy playing (even solo). It has charm and intriguing mechanics but lacks finish. Hopefully i can change this review to positive in the coming weeks.

Enfin un jeu de foot que j'ai vraiment envie de jouer et que j'espère qui seras bien reconnu.

J'ai acheter l’édition Pro pour soutenir les devs car ici on a vraiment un jeu qui est addictif. 

Si vous aimez un peu le foot et déteste les jeux trop réaliste, ici c'est le pied ! Vous avez pas de faute, pas de sortie, le goal qui peut être incarné par tout les joueurs de votre équipe a tout moments sans coupure bref c'est DYNAMIQUE.

On est pas non plus sur un Mario striker football mais plutôt sur Rocket League avec des humains et non des voitures. C'est le même délire mais tellement jouissif de faire des dribbles et terminer sur une passe décisive si on a des joueurs expérimente dans l'équipe.

Le seul hic personnellement qui ma vraiment déranger c'est si votre équipe en ranked ne tiens pas la route ou on a un joueur qui se met AFK et bouge pas (sa sens le vécu oui) vous êtes perdu et perdez vos points bêtement...vraiment rageant mais bon c'est le jeu et vous êtes pas obliger de jouer en ranked tout le temps.

Ayant jouer majoritairement en solo, c'est agréable et on peut couper les micros et voix de nos partenaires (on sais que des joueurs assez "énergétique" sont présent sur ce sport) et globalement, mes partenaires de jeux était correct a quelques exceptions prés....coucou le goal de mon équipe qui part solo sans faire de passe, se fait piquer la balle et se prendre un but bêtement.

Autre point positif, tout le monde à les mêmes points de compétences et de capacités, pas d'évolution ou de pay to win possible. Tout repose sur vos compétence de maniabilité de votre joueur et de votre esprit co-op.

Bref, c'est fun, sa fonctionne et si vous voulez faire du ranked, je vous conseil de trouver 4 autres joueurs et que vous vous trouver en session privé pour vous entraînez car oui des sessions privés sont possibles et cela est un big plus si vous voulez que jouer entre amis quelques sois le nombre (maximum 10 joueurs par session). Même le 1 vs 1 fonctionne pour dire.

Bonne games à tous et je serais pas étonner que le jeu auras de l'e-sport dessus tellement que c'est un jeu assez addictif malgrer les ressemblances à rocket league. Ici au moins, on peut manier mieux la balle. XD

I really wanted this game to succeed and I still do, that's why I brought the Elite Edition even though game was already released and I did not get to play it early, so you can tell I gave extra bucks just to support them. I played this game in beta tests too and it was full of bugs with very toast servers. Bugs are understandable but the ping issue with toast servers? I still gave it a pass saying it's beta anyway. And here is the full release which I paid 50 bucks for or 30 bucks if you just get the base game and game still has the same bugs from the beta tests, servers are still toast and I mean I can just use my own PC to host a server and players will still get better pings. Game is still unoptimized so you don't get high FPS even though game doesn't have anything going on that should be demanding and I have pretty good PC btw, game crashes every hour constantly and this was also happening in the beta test but now in full release it happens maybe even more often. They knew all those problems from the beta tests and they still released it as is and asked for 30 bucks shamelessly. This game is kind of like Rocket League, there isn't much content to the game you just have a 5v5 match in a small field and that's it. That's the whole game. I am also in game design and I assure you with solid planning and team you can make this game happen even without all those bugs and crashes in a year yet they still couldn't manage to pull it of and still asked for 30 bucks. Let alone 10 bucks this game needs to be free just like Rocket League and make money from the battle-pass they already have in-game. Also all the ping and crashes happen to all my friends from all around the world no matter the server.

[h1] TLDR; [/h1] 
Constant crashes, ♥♥♥♥♥♥ servers with high ping, lots of bugs even though they did beta tests which I joined, had the same problems, they were aware of those due to our beta test play feedback and still couldn't/didn't fix them and decided to release a simple straight forward game that can be made in a year in asking for 30 bucks without shame while it should have been 10 bucks or even free since they already have battle-passes and lots of cosmetics which already tells you enough what they really care about...

Update: still sucks and they don't give a single fack about it.

I wish I could recommend this game, because it's a blast with friends, but in its current state:

- You. Cant. Re-map. Controls. w. t. f.
- The servers are horrendously unstable resulting in constant desync and disconnect with no reconnect option.
- The netcode is frequently jank, so you frequently can't tell if you got outplayed or just rubberbanded badly.
- The connection issues are so bad my Plex server gets throttled in the background. How did they manage that?
- No crossplay on a gamepass release is criminal. Fix this already.
- No reporting system for players throwing matches.

On the positive side: 
- it's a fun game that's co-op with up to 4 of your friends at a reasonable price.
- has a higher than average learning curve for the controls, but is orders of magnitude easier to pickup than rocket league.
- retains a high skill cap along with lots of football (soccer) fundamentals.
- the dribble/push system feels refreshingly like actual football (soccer).

The core game has tons of potential for being the most natural feeling football (soccer) game out there, but the incomplete/broken features really needed time to cook before this was released. Fingers crossed for the future because there's a lot of fun to be had if the major issue get ironed out.

EDIT 2: Depois de 190 horas, evidentemente falhei em desinstalar e esquecer indefinidamente, mas as críticas continuam as mesmas. Os lags durante a partida continuam habituais e ainda há o bug de intangibilidade ao voltar pra partida depois de ter caído. [EDIT] Changing my review. It is now all but impossible to play this game & enjoy the experience in the 5 v 5 ranked queue as anything but a 5-player party. Players constantly disconnecting/crashing/rage-quitting & just flat-out own goaling to derank all without a penalty to the player. If this game is going to have any sort of longevity as an online multiplayer game it's really going to need a disciplinary process to deal with the enormous amount of griefing. 

The game is really well suited to couch co-op at the moment, but quite honestly I'd refund this if I could even with the playtime I have. [EDIT]

It's one of those games that you keep queuing for because the games are short and your chasing those 1 or 2 games where people try to play properly. The game itself is fun, but not without flaws. There's some weird collision stuff between player and ball possibly even netcoding? (ball zipping straight through players & keepers making a save but for some reason the game still declares a goal). The game's best mechanic is the Tiki Taka passing and movement which is unfortunately largely ignored with lots of players thinking they only have to play as Striker or something.

It's a good bang for your buck game playtime wise, but there is a veneer to this game that I can already see wearing thin and it's largely community based. As the game gets cheaper over time, possibly even free-to-play the playerbase will become flooded with alt accounts, boosters, scripters and the usual. 

That being said are 3, 4 & 5 player game modes so it shouldn't be too hard to play this as a party in some form.

After almost playing 100 hours, it really breaks my heart to say that i CURRENTLY do NOT recommend getting this game. Its probably one of the best games I've played EVER, and ever since the trailer came out, i was already hooked. However, there are some problems that I want to address that I know would get fixed/implemented soon (at least i hope).

Cross-play: Devs. cross-play is A MUST. I'm glad that this is your top priority, and I know everyone is waiting patiently for it, but cross-play not being available at launch affected it more that you (and even I) think. I have some friends that refuse to play until cross-play is out, and there's also another aspect of the game that i think is being affected by cross-play, which is my next point

Ranked: PLEASE PLEASE EXPLAIN why I'm being queued with silvers and golds? it took me a while to solo climb to masters. but doing so by myself is SO frustrating because you don't know who you're being queued with. there were multiple times when i was in plat/diamond where i hear someone in game chat saying "hmm we need one more placement rank" or "am i finally out of silver 2?" and it shows in my match quality. And why could I queue ranked with someone lower than level 5 as long as the party leader is above level 5? There's just a lot of idk's when it comes to ranked, i don't know if my rank even matters right now. As it stands, a lot of changes need to happen for this part of the game, INCLUDING more ranked modes (ranked 3's and 4's).

Collabs: why are we doing this right now? maybe it was already premeditated and all you had to do was release it, so in that case it's fine, but if not, we should be focusing on fixing the game and cross-play.

Pricing: I bought pro edition because I wanted to support sloclap in any way i can. I was a fan of absolver, but I got into it too late, and the game was pretty dead by the time i got my hands on it. I want this game to live for a long time. A really long time. so please adjust the pricing of this game, specially because you already have a battlepass in the game. not a lot of people are going to like a paid game with a battlepass. And on top of that, later parts of the battlepass are locked until a certain day, which after some thinking, doesn't make sense. Maybe lowering the price would drive in better sales, which will make more money, and maybe also unlock the whole battlepass from the get-go so people can enjoy some cosmetics.

Overall, the game is still REALLY ENJOYABLE, specially with friends, which is why i think once cross-play comes out, the game's going to skyrocket a little bit. Other than that. I ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ love this game.

When I played the playtest, I looked over the issues of the UI being basically useless and the fact that it automatically changes my microphone input every single time I start the game up, but now they basically released the playtest for a 25 EUR pricetag, but thankfully you now have microtransactions working flawlessly.

Issues:
-You CANNOT cancel the matchmaking, even if you do cancel it, it just continues until it finds you a game, no matter what
-Slow and unresponsive UI
-Half the time the UI just does not work
-There is still major desync very often, sometimes you just straight up go through the ball
-Major freezes happen often in the menus
-Lack of gamemodes (3v3 and 4v4 ranked does not exist, we could have a casual mode with more players or something a little goofy)
-Steam achievments work only half the time
-Ranking up is entirely based on luck. It really depends on what kind of team you get and what kind of team the opposing team is. Since ranking up just takes a winning streak the ranks are very much hit and miss since carrying is near impossible here unlike in other games that are sort of similar, so you can very easily be stuck in a rank, which is just incredibly frustrating, since if you want to queue with other they might not let you because of your low ranking.

My biggest fear is that the game won't be fixed in time and the playerbase just turning away from it, because the game genuinely has a lot of potential, but in it's current state I cannot recommend it sadly (especially not for full price).

P.S.: This review is constantly being updated as I keep playing.

I really love the game. the idea is great but the execution is terrible.

Lets start with the bugs: there are so many bugs with the ball, especially the goalkeeper. It’s like 50/50 whether the keeper’s hitbox will actually be where it’s supposed to be or not. As a striker, it’s super hard to shoot on goal because the keeper can catch the ball from impossible spots with a broken hitbox. But from the keeper’s perspective, it’s just as bad the ball can go right through your body or just randomly slip out of your hands. There are so many bugs I can’t even count them all. I don’t think the game should’ve been released in this state.

The menu is terrible too. So many times when you queue for quick match, it throws you into a match that’s already started and then it’s a coin flip if you can even move. I don’t get why you can’t just leave a quick play match whenever you want (not that it works anyway it says you’ll get suspended, but if you leave a ranked game nothing happens). The ranked system is a joke too. Win 4 out of 5 placement matches and you still get dropped into Bronze 2. Then no matter what you do you’re MVP, you score loads of points, or you win 10 in a row you still only get +20 RP. But if you lose, even if your entire team leaves, you still get -20 RP. And when you reach the top of a league, you have to win 2 matches in a row just to rank up, but if you lose 2, you get -30 RP and have to grind all over again.

The battle pass system barely works sometimes you have to try 20 times to claim your rewards. You even get the normal currency with a delay.

And don’t get me started on the matchmaking 2 out of 10 matches just won’t load at all. The matchmaking system is broken: you can’t cancel it, and if you queue again in a match it adds your previous wait time to the next match and the time you were already in-game. There’s no rematch button either.

For a team game, there are barely any in-game signals. All you can do is call for a pass, but there should be basic commands like 'attack' or 'fall back and defend.' And the player roles  right now you just have the keeper and a regular player. For a football game with 5v5, there should be more roles like defenders. It’s super hard to play as a keeper because no one helps you defend so if 3 players rush you and your teammates are still upfield, there’s basically no way to save it.

Something should be done about passing too it’s unnecessarily hard to pass in this game, but fine, you can learn that. The real issue is no one passes anyway. There should be a penalty for players who never pass  like not allowing someone to hold the ball for too long.

This rotating system is actually good, but there should be a penalty if you leave goal on purpose. Otherwise, the team just loses because the keeper runs out.

In short: The game is still missing a lot. The current state feels more like a Beta than a full release. It’s full of bugs. But I see that the devs are actively trying to fix things, so I really wish them the best of luck. I hope they can fix all these issues and turn it into a truly great game.

Fix the net code and passing and I will put the review to positive :)

Edit: It's better now, but the player base is steadily going down, hopefully it will go back up as the game is updated.

[h1]Футбольный экшн нового поколения[/h1]
[h2]Почему Rematch стоит попробовать?[/h2]
[b]Rematch[/b] — это свежий взгляд на футбольные симуляции, сочетающий динамику аркадного экшена и глубину стратегии. Разработчики из создали игру, которая подойдет как опытным игрокам, так и новичкам.
[h3]Основные особенности[/h3]
[list]
[][b]Уникальный стиль[/b]: От футбольных полей до космических станций — локации поражают воображение.
[b]Режимы игры[/b]: 5v5, 4v4, 3v3 — каждый матч требует командной синхронизации и индивидуального мастерства.
[][b]Управление[/b]: Контроль над одним персонажем вместо всей команды добавляет азарта и свободы действий.
[b]Графика и звук[/b]: Яркие визуалы, реалистичная анимация и треки, подчеркивающие напряжение матча.
[/list]
[h2]Игровой процесс[/h2]
[u]Простота и глубина[/u]:
[i]Rematch[/i] захватывает с первых минут. Каждый удар, передача и прыжок зависят от вашей ловкости. Даже те, кто никогда не играл в футбол, оценят адреналин сальто и точных ударов!
[strike]Скучные стадионы?[/strike] Забудьте! Локации вроде космических платформ и абстрактных арен превращают каждый матч в шоу.
[spoiler]
[h3]P.S. Подарки для автора 😊[/h3]
Если мой отзыв вам понравился — не скупитесь на подарки! Они вдохновляют на новые обзоры. [b]Спасибо за поддержку![/b] 🎁⚽
[/spoiler]

[h3] Pros [/h3]
[list]
[*] Skill-first arcade football – 5 v 5 (plus 3 v 3 & 4 v 4) third-person matches where each player controls a single avatar; no stat boosts, just mechanics and teamwork.
[*] Rocket League-meets-Sifu feel – wall passes, manual aiming, stamina-based sprints; every possession is a highlight-reel waiting to happen.
[*] Healthy launch population – peaked at 100 k concurrents in open beta and lobbies still fill in seconds.
[*] Fair $30 buy-to-play model – seasonal cosmetics only; no loot boxes or pay-to-win worries.
[/list] 

[h3] Cons [/h3]
[list]
[*] Cross-play still MIA (promised “soon”); server hiccups crop up in overtime.
[*] Steep learning curve – bare-bones tutorials mean you’ll sky-shot your first dozen chances.
[*] Launch-light content – few arenas and modes today; offline AI coming 2026.
[/list] 


Verdict: Love tight mechanics and tactical team play? Rematch is the freshest kick since Rocket League. 

Looking for a chill kick-about or full feature set? Park it on the wish-list until cross-play lands.

Picking up the ball while running is non existent, it marks for you the ball, but most of the time your player just watches it instead of taking it in legs. Also passing and shooting are very different, you must pass the ball with locked camera and pointing with mouse the direction you want the ball to go, so most of the time you have no clue where you're passing if you are facing back from your teammates because you're trying to get it out of corner, but when shooting you must be faced with camera where you shoot, so for example if someone is crossing you from outside, you can't see where the ball is, just to shoot and prey to god that the ball is coming to you and magically end up in goal. If passing is camera locked, why is shooting not and vice versa? Also camera locking is very bad game design, very bad! Also some of the time it's not even worth tackling cause the opposite player with ball that gets tackled almost always get faster to ball even though he was tackled. The game has a great idea, but very bad controls for now, need a lot of improvement!

ALLLLLOOOO LES DEVS IL FAUT SE REVEILLER !!!

Bonjour, je fais ce petit test afin de vous faire économiser de l'argent (pour l'instant en tout cas). 
Rematch est un jeu de foot qui a pour but de réinventer les codes afin de se différencier de ce qui se fait déjà (FIFA, PES, etc...) en proposant un gameplay en troisième personne sur un terrain de foot classique en 5vs5 avec des mécaniques  un peu surnaturelles parfois qui peut nous rappeler nos animés d'enfance tel Inazuma ELEVEN ou Galactic FOOTBALL. C'est intéressant et alléchant avec un système de rotation du gardien de but pas mal (manque le fait de pouvoir élire un unique gardien dans notre groupe au passage).
En bref, sur le papier, c'est captivant et on a envie d'en savoir plus, j'ai donc acheté le jeu (en ayant au passage passé pas mal de temps sur les bétas précédentes), c'est là que les problèmes commencent ...

Ce jeu est une purge une fois les stratégies et mécaniques de jeu acquises, c'est simple, ne comptez pas prendre une once de plaisir si vous n'êtes pas en groupe de 5, si vous n'êtes pas accompagnés, préparez-vous à vivre l'enfer avec des coéquipiers aussi stupides que toxiques, qui se prennent pour les héros de Blue Lock en pensant que le foot se joue seul contre tous, à enchainer les dribbles inutiles, en ne faisant aucune passe, et en défendant aussi bien que Gilbert Montagné sous weed (s'ils acceptent de revenir en défense bien-sûr). Sans compter sur les idiots qui pensent directement que le rôle de gardien de but n'est pas le leur et qu'ils peuvent donc courir en dehors des cages dès l'engagement.
Si par chance vous avez 4 amis qui acceptent de subir le jeu avec vous, vous allez vite vous rendre compte que ce jeu est bugué à un point... C'est simple, aucun problème n'a été réglé depuis la précédente béta, c'est à dire que les dribbles cheatés le sont tout autant, les problèmes de net code et de serveur rendent le skill gap approximatif, il suffit d'être sur le bon serveur pour que votre action soit prise en compte alors que sur un autre non, la méta qui a déjà rendu le jeu ennuyeux à souhait, c'est simple, le gardien avance et centre fort plein mid pour l'attaquant , et ça ainsi de suite en boucle, il y a pleins d'autre problèmes mais je vais m'arrêter là, ceux cités ci-dessus suffisent à se rendre compte que ce jeu est claqué au sous-sol.
Ce jeu est souvent comparé à Rocket League il n'a hélas pour l'instant, que pour seul point commun, sa communauté ultra toxique.

Pour finir j'ai quand même bien aimé quand j'ai joué à relativement bas niveau avec des potes sans prise de tête, et je souhaite que les dévs réagissent vite afin se sauver le bateau qui risquerait de finir comme le TITANIC dans pas longtemps si aucun effort n'est fourni.

If Jesus walking and other game breaking glitches don't get patched. I'm done with Rematch.

Seems like m&k is the best way to play this game. Seems like players are pulling off actions that are near impossible on controller. Spamming movement exploits and precision are going to kill this game. 
I didn't realize it was this bad. 
Sucks, because I really liked this game. 
There are a ton of other broken mechanics the devs clearly didn’t think fix. Telling people to use a controller feels likes a way to cover up stuff they didn’t bother to fix before launch.

Now that the sweats exploiting these mechanics start buying up cosmetics, devs are probably going to loose the incentive to fix anything. I doubt they will risk upsetting their PAYER base. Honestly, I should’ve known this was coming the moment microtransactions were a thing on top of already purchasing the game...

And I don't know how they're going to fix the mouse and keyboard versus controller problem. Unless they give controller super magnetism for shooting goals or passing to players, it's difficult to compete with m&k.
Don't get me wrong, I love the overall gameplay of rematch. 

But if I already paid $, And they shill for the selfish, self-destructive player base, then I see this game becoming a free-to-play in less than 2 years. 

I mean, they're already charged you $10 more to play the game 3 days early w/ "battle pass". There's no reason they wouldn't switch to a freemium based economy.... overwatch, battlefield 2042, and PUBG did.. Fundamentally, I don't think they should include a paid battle pass.
I miss the expansion pack days.. lol

Back to my core problem.
In Apex Legends, I had to specifically learn moves that were not originally intended in the game like tap strafing, wall bouncing, super glide in order to achieve mid-level play. (But I don't get much room to complain when the game is free to play.)
Whereas I'm paying out the gate for rematch. The game should have been polished already. And I can tolerate glitchy mechanics devs are going to fix, what I can't stand is glitchy mechanics being adopted into the game for the sake of the sweaty "payer base". This kills the spirit of the game, spirit of soccer/football itself. Instead of passing, and relying on teamwork, people are selfishly holding onto the ball exploiting game breaking mechanics, (and getting really good at them). If this is the trend now, I don't see it stopping. 

Last problem:
I discovered many people are using REWASD to achieve difficult combos consistently. (Soft cheating macro input software). 
Seemingly, Higher elo gameplay will likely be filled with these players

A fun game, with a lot of potential but that ends up being extremely frustrating really fast.

- Defending? Good luck, there is simply no defending in REMATCH, it is impossible, it is so awful you simply wait for attackers to fail shooting. Tackles are useless, even if you actually get to make an interception, 90% of the times your opponent still gets the possession of the ball.

- Goalkeepers are godlike, this title is so arcade that makes them extremely hard to beat, it is so unrealistic and unfair, developers did not even try to make this game balanced, i will give you an example: you shoot, if the goalkeeper fails to save the shoot but eventually your shot hits the wall or the post and hits any part of his body, he instantly grabs it, there is little no physics, zero, in this game, everything is directional. There should be instead something like, press and hold button to hold the ball in your hands, but no... they think animation based is the answer, this game had no planning at all.

- Possession, you lose possession like your feet were made of butter, many times the ball simply without explanation runs away from you, many times it even goes through your character's body, it is hilarious and frustrating.

-Ranked system is broken, you will be utterly disappointed if you believe you will get better teammates or greater matches, you play with everyone and every rank, no matter what your ranking is, like everything in this game, it does not work.

- Disconnected, it happened multiple times during matches, to me and to team mates.
unplayable, full of bugs, lag issues, ball goes through your body like i said earlier, happens a lot when shooting and trying to tackle. There are other bugs like customising your character and your changes are not changed while playing a match but they change in the menu screen. If you run past another player without the ball, there is collision, but when it is about animations like shooting sometimes if seems collision is turn off, it is so confusing.

Hard to understand how this game has mostly positive reviews on steam, raw development, unfinished game on alpha state, not a finished game. High price asked, 25€ is to much for a game already full of microtransactions with unfinished gameloop and broken servers. Requires a lot of gameplay fixes and overall balance of the game. I do not recommend it in its current state.

As far as game design goes, REMATCH misses the mark in almost every quality-of-life category it has. Server response time is inconsistent. You will see players teleport to the ball almost every match, beating you in priority to take possession. Despite a price tag of $30 USD, this team felt it necessary to include a PAID FOR BATTLEPASS and PREMIUM CURRENCY. There is no consistency or explanation as to how you earn tokens to unlock cosmetics in the BP either. I've gotten 1,000 xp for 3v3 quickplay match, then got four (4) xp playing another one right after. Many menus are broken. Cosmetics you CAN unlock will be missing their price tag, description, or will bug out your character so you can't preview it

These are just a few in what are many elements that seemed to take the backseat in releasing this game. Do I have fun playing the game? Yes, a lot. With 6 minute match times this game shares Rocket League's pacing for a good, quick time. But would I recommend it to other's? Not at the moment. Football means a lot of things to a lot of people worldwide, and I don't think Sloclap has provided the TLC necessary to release a product worthy of its price tag.

TL;DR half-baked game with excellent gameplay. If QoL elements don't matter to you then get it. Don't listen to the reviews complaing of other players. Those will exists for every online, competitive game forever

I would still absolutely recommend this game in 2026, it's just incredibly fun and unique, however I also think going F2P and adding monetization in the form of skins or cool effects after doing certain moves, would benefit this game a lot and keep its playerbase alive long-term. Not that it's a dead game, but it seems to be a bit on the decline.

There is a fundamental flaw in this game in that defending is ridiculously under-powered. And so the game is, at its core, not balanced. Attackers have so many tools at their disposal - they can do crazy flicks, touches, curled passes/shots, lobs. Attackers benefit more from the boost mechanic overall since they can use it for powerful touches and shots. They also benefit more from walls since they can use it for rebounds and bypass defenders that way with ease. Goalkeepers are pretty balanced and can be fun. But defenders are completely crap which feels like a design decision to appease players who don't want to defend in the first place. Defenders have a jockey mechanic that has a small hitbox for interceptions and are almost useless against rainbow flicks and logs, unless you do a jump - which also has a small hitbox. And you do decide to jump (in which situation you're often guessing they're doing a lob pass or rainbow flick) then you've taken yourself out of the game since the animation takes so long overall. 

A game like this needs to have a good battle between attack and defence. In rocket league, if you concede a goal, nine times out of ten you can think of something you could have done differently to prevent that goal. In this game as a defender you're often a sitting duck and have to hope your goalkeeper knows what they're doing.

The only way this review is turned to positive is if defending gets significantly buffed. I predict this issue getting worse since players will get better mechanics and this will only make attacking play even more powerful simply because they have more and better mechanics at their disposal.
